svg.text: Behavioral Threat & Fraud Detection · Six-Module Analytics Engine
All incoming events: transactions · access logs · SWIFT messages · communications · relationship identifiers

g.text: Do multiple modules flag the SAME employee, loan, or entity? → Correlation bonus added to final score · 3 medium signals > 1 high signal in isolation
This is the layer that catches coordinated fraud (e.g. PNB: CBS gap + UEBA anomaly + authority breach all pointing at the same person)
Trained meta-model over 5 module scores + correlation bonus → Final Risk Score (0–100) · Threat Level: LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH / CRITICAL
Actions: Monitor · Notify · Hold Loan · Freeze Account · Escalate to Audit Team
SHAP values + Rule triggers + Graph paths → NLG Engine → Auditor-readable natural-language note
Grounded strictly in model output — not free-written — to prevent plausible-but-unfaithful explanations under regulatory scrutiny
RBAC role views (Manager · Compliance Officer · Auditor) · WebSocket live alerts · Neo4j subgraph visualisation · SHAP waterfall charts · Audit trail export
